stein_elements.initiating_event: Gajendra enters lake, crocodile grabs his leg
stein_elements.goal: Gajendra prays to Vishnu for liberation
stein_elements.attempt: Gajendra struggles for thousand years, finally surrenders to Vishnu
stein_elements.consequence: Vishnu descends on Garuda, slays crocodile, liberates Gajendra
stein_elements.reaction: Gajendra attains moksha, crocodile freed from curse

scenes.description: Gajendra enters the lake with his herd
Crocodile grabs Gajendra's leg, struggle begins
Gajendra prays to Vishnu with lotus flower raised
Vishnu descends on Garuda to rescue Gajendra
Vishnu slays crocodile with Sudarshana Chakra, Gajendra attains moksha
